name: Giulio Catanzariti
val_bpb: WIP — preliminary results on 1xH100, requesting 8xH100 for full eval
description: Neurosymbolic hybrid: Ontology-Augmented Generation (OAG) combining FST structural predictor + backward-looking n-gram cache + Product Key Memory + entropy-adaptive gating. Novel paradigm: decompose prediction across specialized predictors matched to web text entropy structure.
